metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Fetri Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Fetri is a village locality near Nagpur situated in proximity to the MIHAN corridor. As MIHAN's growth spreads outward, villages like Fetri are being integrated into Nagpur's expanding residential map. Buyers looking for peaceful, green surroundings with future investment upside will find Fetri appealing. The area offers lower land prices compared to established MIHAN-adjacent localities, presenting an early-mover opportunity for long-term investors.
whyInvest: Peaceful village setting with green surroundings
Lower prices than established MIHAN zones
